title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an AI feature by Anthropic that enables users to create prototypes, presentations, and landing pages through natural language prompts. The tool supports multiple creation modes including Prototype, Slide Deck, Templates, and Custom options, with automatic generation of UI, layouts, and components that can be downloaded as functional code.
